title: callerya reticulata
intro: Callerya reticulata, also known as the Chinese fishbone orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polygalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Callerya reticulata include its ability to lower blood pressure, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
